subcodes.first_line: O radiant youth! Thy letter dated 10 February 1921 was received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوان نورانی نامه که بتاریخ ۱۰ فبرواری ۱۹۲۱ مرقوم نموده بودید رسید
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @relationship between government and people, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @composure; tranquillity; serenity
